mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, p.category_id, c.category_name FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, p.category_id, c.category_name FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, p.category_id, c.category_name FROM tb_product p LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_product (name, price, category_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{price}, #{categoryId})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_product SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, category_id = #{categoryId} WHERE id = #{id}
